name: Net Present Value of Growth Opportunities (NPVGO)
short_description: Calculate the Net Present Value of Growth Opportunities (NPVGO). This function computes the net present value of future cash flows from growth opportunities, such as new projects or acquisitions. The NPVGO helps assess the intrinsic value per share from these growth opportunities.

source_meta.article_title: Net Present Value of Growth Opportunities (NPVGO)

inputs.name: projected_cash_inflows
inputs.description: The projected future cash inflows from growth opportunities.

inputs.name: cost_of_capital
inputs.description: The firm's cost of capital used for discounting, expressed as a decimal.

inputs.name: initial_investment
inputs.description: The initial investment cost or purchase price of the project or asset.

output.name: npvgo
output.description: The net present value of the growth opportunities.

execution.code:
def compute(inputs):
    projected_cash_inflows = inputs['projected_cash_inflows']
    cost_of_capital = inputs['cost_of_capital']
    initial_investment = inputs['initial_investment']

    discounted_cash_flows = projected_cash_inflows / (1 + cost_of_capital)
    npvgo = discounted_cash_flows - initial_investment
    
    return npvgo

diagnostic_checks.name: Positive Cost of Capital
diagnostic_checks.description: The cost of capital must be a positive value for valid discounting.

diagnostic_checks.name: Cost of Capital Range (0 to 1)
diagnostic_checks.description: The cost of capital, when expressed as a decimal, should be less than 1.

diagnostic_checks.name: Positive Projected Cash Inflows
diagnostic_checks.description: Projected cash inflows must be positive for a growth opportunity to potentially add value.

diagnostic_checks.name: Positive Initial Investment
diagnostic_checks.description: The initial investment must be a positive value.

diagnostic_checks.name: NPVGO Interpretation
diagnostic_checks.description: Evaluate the calculated NPVGO to understand its implications for the investment decision.
